creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
garga       2012-03-18 11:37:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www/sarg             Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/sarg/files       patch-log.c 
  Log:
  Due to a bug, the download report only showed the host name instead of the
  full url as it used to do prior to version 2.3.2.
  
  Fix it applying a patch that was committed upstream.
  
  PR:             ports/165412
  Submitted by:   Kryol <kryol@bigmir.net>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.54      +1 -1      ports/www/sarg/Makefile
  1.7       +33 -0     ports/www/sarg/files/patch-log.c (new)
